contentBlocks.original:
शंभुं देवं सकलजगतां ईश्वरंचत्रिनेत्रम् ।
गौरीनाथं सुखदवरदं चंद्रचूडं भजामि ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śaṃbhuṃ devaṃ sakalajagatāṃ īśvaraṃcatrinetram .
gaurīnāthaṃ sukhadavaradaṃ caṃdracūḍaṃ bhajāmi ..
contentBlocks.translation: I sing in praise of God Shambhu, the Lord of all worlds, and the three-eyed one; the consort of Gauri, the grantor of happiness, blessings and gifts, the one with the moon as his crest-jewel.
contentBlocks.meanings: शंभुं (śaṃbhuṃ) – Shambhu; देवं (devaṃ) – God; सकलजगतां (sakalajagatāṃ) – of all worlds (sakala:all | jagatām:of worlds); ईश्वरं (īśvaraṃ) – Lord; च (ca) – and; त्रिनेत्रम् (trinetrām) – three-eyed one (tri:three | netram:eye); गौरीनाथं (gaurīnāthaṃ) – consort of Gauri (gaurī:Gauri | nātham:consort); सुखदवरदं (sukhadavaradaṃ) – grantor of happiness and gifts (sukhada:grantor of happiness | varadam:grantor of gifts); चंद्रचूडं (caṃdracūḍaṃ) – with the moon as crest-jewel (candra:moon | cūḍa:crest-jewel); भजामि (bhajāmi) – I sing in praise;
